headline: Abbott’s Lingo Wearable And Cardio R&D Reframe Long Term Growth Story
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) is expanding its presence in health tech with new diagnostics and wearable products, including the Lingo biomarker monitoring device. The company is also increasing R&D activity in cardiovascular diagnostics, aiming to broaden its role in earlier detection and ongoing monitoring of heart related conditions. These product moves come as attention on Abbott has recently centered on earnings, insider activity, and the Exact Sciences acquisition rather than its...
